inputs.text: Cyberpunk futuristic illustration of an AI-powered design assistant for creative designers. A holographic AI figure in the center with neon circuit patterns, surrounded by four holographic floating screens: text analysis interface, research data visualization, wireframe hologram, and a stunning high-fidelity UI design. The AI's hands sort and remove repetitive grey data blocks from designers, freeing them to create glowing neon artworks and make bold creative decisions. Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon glow (cyan, magenta, electric blue, warm orange), holographic projections, dark background with grid lines and particle effects, futuristic and powerful mood, dramatic lighting, centered composition, 1024x1024
blurry, low quality, distorted faces, ugly, deformed, text overlay, watermark, signature, realistic photo, 3d render, dark moody
